hero.title: Put the Word on the Screen effortlessly.
hero.subtitle: BibSlide helps churches transform Bible verses and songs into beautiful PowerPoint presentations in seconds.

mission.title: Empowering Churches to Create Without Limits
mission.text: Each year, churches spend thousands of dollars on presentation tools. BibSlide was built to offer a free, cloud-based alternative — helping ministries focus more on their mission, not on software costs.

features.title: Simple. Powerful. Made for Worship.
features.subtitle: Everything you need to manage the projection of the Word and music in one place.

bible.title: Bible Search
bible.desc: Instantly insert Bible verses in multiple languages (FR/EN/ES).

songs.title: Song & Lyrics Import
songs.desc: Quickly add worship lyrics from Cesperance or manual input.

templates.title: Templates & Styles
templates.desc: Choose from clean, elegant PowerPoint themes ready to export.

remote.title: Remote Control
remote.desc: Control your slides directly from your mobile phone.

timer.desc: Show countdowns for services and events.

cloud.title: Cloud Save
cloud.desc: All your slides and templates saved in Supabase cloud.

tutorial.subtitle: Learn how to create stunning church presentations in just minutes.

comparison.title: How BibSlide Compares to Other Church Presentation Tools
comparison.subtitle: Discover how BibSlide stands out — free, multilingual, cloud-based, and made for churches everywhere.

about.title: About BibSlide
about.description1: BibSlide is a creative tool developed by Wanky Massenat to help pastors, singers, and church technical teams prepare beautiful biblical presentations with efficiency and inspiration.
about.description2: Our goal is to bring Technology and Faith together to serve God with excellence.
about.description3: With BibSlide, you can search for verses, songs, or biblical passages, and automatically transform them into PowerPoint slides (.pptx) or PDF for projection during worship. The tool is easy to use, fast, and compatible with mobile devices, computers, and projectors.
about.missionDesc: BibSlide's mission is to help churches use modern digital tools to make their spiritual communication more attractive, simple, and accessible to everyone — without paid costs or technical complexity. We believe God's word deserves to be presented with beauty and respect.
about.developerDesc: Wanky Massenat is a doctor, developer, and passionate creator who believes in the power of God and technology. He is the founder of Wanky Academy and creator of Belmagg Company LLC. His mission is to serve God with digital skills to transform the community.

terms.title: Terms of Use – BibSlide
terms.section1Desc: BibSlide is a tool created by Wanky Massenat to help churches, preachers, and those serving God present biblical verses easily during services, conferences, or Bible studies. The platform is designed to serve as technical and spiritual support — not as a commercial tool.
terms.section2Item1: You have the right to use BibSlide to create personal or church presentations.
terms.section2Item2: You do not have the right to sell or redistribute the application or the .pptx files derived from it as a paid service without the author's permission.
terms.section2Item3: All biblical texts are derived from public translations (Bib Kreyòl 1985, Louis Segond 1910, or King James Version) and remain public property.
terms.section3Item1: The user is responsible for how they use the content during services or publications.
terms.section3Item2: BibSlide is not responsible for any misuse or errors in the verses.
terms.section3Item3: The user must respect God's word with respect and integrity.
terms.section4Item1: BibSlide does not collect any personal information.
terms.section4Item2: All content generation is done through the Biblia.com API using public biblical data.
terms.section4Item3: No user data is stored on external servers without consent.
terms.section5Desc: Wanky Massenat reserves the right to modify the terms of use at any time to improve the service or add new functions. All changes will be published on this page.
terms.section6Desc: By using BibSlide, you agree to all the terms written in this document. If you do not agree, please stop using the platform.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.desc1: BibSlide respects the privacy of every user.
privacy.desc2: We do not collect, sell, or share any personal data. All operations are performed locally or through the Biblia.com API service only to retrieve public biblical texts.
